name: The Autumn Archive
tagline: Coats, corduroy, and the pieces built for weather
description: Shearling, waxed cotton, and wool built for decades, not seasons. Every coat in this edit has already survived one winter it wasn't supposed to.

name: Denim Diaries
tagline: Selvedge, flares, and honest wear through the decades
description: From 70s flares to 90s truckers — denim tells time better than anything else in the store. We keep the fades that took decades to earn.

name: The Luxury Vintage Edit
description: Our most closely vetted rail. Every piece here is authenticated, condition-graded, and genuinely rare — the reason collectors check this page first.

name: Sunday Market
description: The small pieces that make an outfit feel finished — bags, boots, belts, and the kind of gold-tone sunglasses that never went out of style.
